content.hint: 用表达经济紧张但不拒绝未来的说法，强调是财务原因，不是兴趣问题
content.situation: 朋友邀请你参加一次周末露营活动，你很想参加但最近手头紧，想婉拒并表达未来参与的意愿。
content.speakerText: Hey, we’re hitting the woods for a weekend campout—want to join? It’s super low-cost!
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我们周末去森林露营，一起来吗？超便宜的！
content.knowledgePoint: 用委婉经济理由婉拒邀约 + 表达未来参与意愿
content.responseTemplate: That sounds awesome! I’ve been wanting to do something like this... but ___ this month. Can I tag along next time?
